description: Enable support for up to 2 Claude.ai accounts with independent usage monitoring and nicknames.

userStories.title: Migrate storage to account array
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to migrate the existing single-account storage to an array-based structure so that I can support multiple accounts.
acceptanceCriteria: Check for existing sessionKey and organizationId in electron-store
If they exist, move them into an accounts array as the first entry
Each account object has a unique id
Typecheck/lint passes
Verify storage migration using puppeteer mcp

userStories.title: Update main process IPC for account list
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to update the get-credentials IPC handler to return the full list of accounts.
acceptanceCriteria: ipcMain.handle('get-credentials', ...) returns the accounts array from the store
Returns an empty array if no accounts are connected
Typecheck/lint passes

userStories.title: Update session cookie management
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to update setSessionCookie to handle switching between accounts during API calls.
acceptanceCriteria: setSessionCookie is called with the specific sessionKey before each account's API request
Ensure cookies are cleared or overwritten correctly to avoid cross-account data leakage
Typecheck/lint passes

userStories.title: Parameterize usage fetching by account
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to update the fetch-usage-data IPC handler to accept an account ID.
acceptanceCriteria: ipcMain.handle('fetch-usage-data', ...) takes accountId as a parameter
It retrieves the correct sessionKey and organizationId for that account
It sets the session cookie before making the request
Typecheck/lint passes

userStories.title: Add Nickname field to Login UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to be able to enter a nickname when connecting an account so I can identify it.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a 'Nickname' input field to loginStep2 in index.html
Update app.js to capture this value during handleConnect
Verify in browser

userStories.title: Update save-credentials for multiple accounts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to update the save-credentials IPC handler to append new accounts to the list.
acceptanceCriteria: ipcMain.handle('save-credentials', ...) appends the new account object to the accounts array
Prevents duplicate accounts based on sessionKey
Typecheck/lint passes

userStories.title: Render multiple account sections in UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want the main widget to render a section for each connected account.
acceptanceCriteria: Refactor app.js to loop through the accounts array
Create a container for each account's usage data
Display the account nickname in the section header
Verify in browser
Verify multiple sections are rendered using puppeteer mcp

userStories.title: Implement independent auto-update
userStories.description: As a developer, I want each account to have its own update cycle.
acceptanceCriteria: fetchUsageData is called for each account in the list
UI updates only the specific section for that account
Verify in browser

userStories.title: Dynamic widget resizing
userStories.description: As a user, I want the widget to grow in height when I have two accounts connected.
acceptanceCriteria: Update resizeWidget to calculate height based on the number of accounts
Ensure the window doesn't cut off content when two accounts are displayed
Verify in browser

userStories.title: Account management in Settings
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manage my accounts from the settings menu.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings overlay lists all connected accounts with nicknames
Each account has a 'Remove' button
'Add Another Account' button visible if < 2 accounts
Verify in browser
Verify account removal using puppeteer mcp

userStories.title: Account-specific session expiration
userStories.description: As a user, I want only the expired account to show a login prompt.
acceptanceCriteria: If API call fails for Account A, only Account A's section shows an 'Expired' state
Account B continues to function normally
Verify in browser
